artifact.content_preview:
From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

extracted_tasks.text: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst

metadata.subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

risks.description: The delivery of Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches is delayed by 14 days, missing the required on-site date for staging and testing.

evidence_refs.excerpt: We have now confirmed a 2-week delay on the network equipment originally scheduled to arrive at your Gatineau facility on March 6. The revised estimated delivery date is March 20, 2026.

risks.description: The delay in equipment delivery directly conflicts with the Q2 migration window, potentially forcing a postponement of the entire Phase 3 migration.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Our migration window opens March 8 and we need the equipment on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing.

risks.description: The project is exposed to a single point of failure due to single-sourcing through a specific warehouse location.

evidence_refs.excerpt: we are currently single-sourced on this product line through our Montreal warehouse

risks.description: The warehouse management system (WMS) failure at the supplier may indicate broader systemic issues or potential data/order integrity risks.

evidence_refs.excerpt: our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse management system failure that has affected outbound shipments

risks.description: The 2-week delay eliminates the buffer for 'staging and testing,' which may lead to a rushed technical implementation and increased risk of network failure during migration.

evidence_refs.excerpt: we need the equipment on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing.

risks.description: Alternative logistics routes (Vancouver) are inefficient and would introduce further delays, limiting the supplier's ability to recover the schedule.

evidence_refs.excerpt: alternative routing via our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days.

risks.description: Potential for increased project costs (budget overrun) due to 'around the clock' expedited shipping efforts or idle technical staff waiting for equipment.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Our team is working around the clock to expedite the shipment.
